source.title: PDD Holdings Q4 2025 and FY2025 Unaudited Financial Results

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2025 total revenue was RMB 431.8B, up 10% YoY
extractions.evidence: FY2025 revenue: RMB 431,845.7 million. Q4 2025 revenue: RMB 123,912.2 million (+12% YoY). FY2024 revenue: RMB 393.8B (implied from 10% growth).

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD Holdings earnings release dated March 25, 2026

extractions.claim: FY2025 quarterly revenue segment breakdown shows Online Marketing Services (OMS) and Transaction Services (TS) roughly equal
extractions.evidence: Q1: OMS RMB 48.7B (+15%) / TS RMB 47.0B (+6%). Q2: OMS RMB 55.7B (+13%) / TS RMB 48.3B (~flat). Q3: OMS RMB 53.3B (+8%) / TS RMB 54.9B (+10%). Q4: OMS RMB 60.0B (+5%) / TS RMB 63.9B (+19%). FY2025 total: OMS ~RMB 217.7B / TS ~RMB 214.2B.

verification.verifier_notes: Quarterly figures from Q1-Q4 2025 earnings releases. FY totals computed by summing quarters.

extractions.claim: Transaction Services revenue accelerated sharply in Q4 2025, suggesting Temu GMV ramp
extractions.evidence: Q4 TS revenue grew 19% YoY vs Q2 flat and Q3 +10%. Q4 TS was RMB 63.9B, the largest quarter ever. TS growth accelerated from flat in Q2 to +19% in Q4.

verification.verifier_notes: TS acceleration in Q4 consistent with Temu's recovery after tariff disruptions in Q2 2025 and geographic diversification to Europe

extractions.claim: Net income fell 12% YoY to RMB 99.4B despite revenue growth, due to heavy investment
extractions.evidence: FY2025 net income: RMB 99.4B (~$14.1B). Total costs of revenue rose 23% YoY. Q4 net income: RMB 24.5B, down 11% YoY.

verification.verifier_notes: From official earnings release. Cost increases driven by fulfillment fees, bandwidth, server costs, payment processing.
